sections.content: I am **Álvaro**, a software developer focused on building practical and efficient solutions. I'm always looking to keep learning and improve my skills through new challenges.

My journey started at the age of 13, **programming video games** in Unity with **C#**. I later studied Software Engineering at the Complutense University of Madrid (UCM), where I strengthened my computer science fundamentals.
Currently, I work as a **freelance developer**, building software for clients with different needs. I also work on personal projects to try out new technologies and keep improving.
